subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Goal of all creation, Who befittingly and graciously bestoweth awareness upon His chosen ones in every moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را لایق و سزا که اولیای خود را در هر حین آگاهی عطا میفرماید بر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition
